description: Find incomplete implementation plans under impl-plans/active, delegate each selected plan to design-and-implement-review-loop, and repeat sequentially until no incomplete active plans remain.

prompts.rielflowPromptTemplate: Coordinate {{workflowId}}. Start by assessing impl-plans/active for the next incomplete implementation plan. If an incomplete active plan exists, package that plan as an implementation request and dispatch design-and-implement-review-loop through the cross-workflow transition. After the delegated workflow completes, record the result and reassess impl-plans/active. Repeat sequentially until assessment reports no incomplete active plans. Then archive completed active plans, refresh indexes, and publish final output.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Return concise business JSON only. Keep selected plan path, delegated workflow input, delegated result, archived paths, active plans remaining, and residual risks explicit.

steps.description: Find the next incomplete active implementation plan, or report that active plans have no remaining incomplete work.
Package the selected active implementation plan as a request for design-and-implement-review-loop.
Record the delegated design-and-implement-review-loop result before reassessing active plans.
Move completed plans out of impl-plans/active and refresh plan indexes before final output.
Publish final evidence that no incomplete active implementation plans remain.
